name: Growthpoint Properties Australia
analysis: GOZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.2600. Trade idea: entry A$2.2700, stop A$2.0790, target A$2.5000 (1.20:1) — then trail it.
